About CSorro

Built from real operations. Designed for real teams.

CSorro OS was born from years of managing projects, people, content, clients and communities across fast-moving online production work.

Mission

To empower teams by bringing people, projects and production together in one operating system — making it easier to collaborate, stay organised and turn ambitious ideas into reality.

Why it exists

Most businesses end up spread across chat apps, drives, spreadsheets, task boards, review tools, invoices and calendars. CSorro OS is built to connect those moving parts.

Founder story

Created by Cristian Sorensen after years working behind creative projects, YouTube productions and operational workflows that needed one place to run properly.

The vision

To become the operating system behind modern businesses, creative teams and growing companies.

Roadmap

Website foundation, OS redesign, live auth, workspace engine, storage, studio review, CRM, reports, invoices and CORE AI.

© CSorro OSHome
